task_description: Add DynamoDB metadata table (SleepAudioMetadataTable) and extend Step Functions state machine with input/output handling (Write Metadata on start, Update Status after processing). Follow strict TDD workflow. Update ARCHITECTURE.md.

verification.summary: All 26 tests pass (10 new DynamoDB/state-machine tests). CDK synth succeeds. Tests exercise real synthesized CloudFormation output and would fail if new resources were removed.
